records.title: School incident response questioned by parents
records.text: Local news reports family gathering near Qinglan School gate. Comments question hidden facts, school responsibility, and response timeline.

records.title: School gate video spreads in same-city feed
records.text: Authorized short video export shows school gate, police car, crowd, family questions, and demand for evidence preservation.

media.asr_text: family asks the school to preserve camera records and explain what happened

records.title: Weibo topic shifts to school responsibility
records.text: Partner feed detects topic migration. The main narrative is changing from accident discussion to school response, hidden facts, and accountability.

records.title: Education Bureau says verification is ongoing
records.text: Education Bureau notice says response and verification are ongoing, but does not yet provide next update time, evidence scope, or family communication mechanism.

records.title: Authorized account summary highlights response gap
records.text: Authorized article summary notes that the current response does not clearly state evidence preservation, family meeting records, or an independent review mechanism.

records.title: Manual live clip upload from scene observer
records.text: Manual upload says a crowd remains near Qinglan School. Analyst note marks offline gathering as unverified but important.

media.asr_text: people are waiting for the school and bureau to give a clear response

records.title: Blocked unapproved platform record
records.text: This record represents a platform path without authorization and must be blocked.

records.title: Blocked private login forum record
records.text: This login-only source is not allowed for P0 collection.
